changes: Added Compose_Run_Context for reusable workflow/run diagnostics.
Renamed key top-level actions to Try/Catch/Send/Compose intent names.
Retargeted the main Catch scope to Try_Decision_Tree Failed/TimedOut.
Added diagnostic error bodies using workflow(), result(), actions(), and trigger output context.
Added failure Terminate actions after error notification paths.
Added a separate final-confirmation email failure catch scope.
Added explicit exponential retry policies to safe read/update connector calls.
Renamed generated Config keys to business-readable names.

notes: Large branch refactors such as If-to-Switch remain intentionally skipped until branch equivalence is manually reviewed.
Final validation still needs Power Automate import/run-history testing.

changes: Terminate_Main_Path_Succeeded now runs only after the final confirmation email succeeds.
Catch_Final_Confirmation_Email remains responsible for final email Failed/TimedOut outcomes.
Updated runAfter and expression references through the workflow definition.
Added tooling validation so action names must be globally unique case-insensitively before import.
Restored SharePoint dataset and table parameters to literal values for connector schema validation.
Removed SharePoint site/list IDs from Config because Power Automate import validation needs static values for PostItem/PatchItem/GetItem item schemas.
Updated rewrite tooling to exclude dataset/table from future Config extraction.
